---
title: Detection of hidden low-frequency earthquakes in southern vancouver island with deep learning
date: '2023-01-01'
author: [Jiun-Ting Lin, Amanda Thomas, Loı̈c Bachelot, Douglas Toomey, Jake Searcy, Diego Melgar]
publication: EarthArXiv (2023).
categories: [environment]
url_source: ''
url_preprint: 'https://eartharxiv.org/repository/view/6118/'
journ: ''
issue: null
page: ''
year: 2023
image: ''
pub_number: 13
---
